历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately changed from 28497 → 31438 → 36406 → 33980 → 37720, showing a clear trend of moving backward; in the last 3 years, it has cumulatively moved backward by about 1323 places; the baseline for 2025 is about 37720; the provincial physics category enrollment plan was 14 in 2021, 21 in 2022, reduced to 7 in 2023-2024, and rebounded to 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 19, an increase of about 58.3% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking around 125th in 2026, stable in recent years; reputation stable in recent years, no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin attention average; no record of admission gaps; Applied Economics rated A-, related to the Economics category in physics enrollment; Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors, though not A-rated, have stable social demand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors have high social popularity and are highly recommended; the provincial physics category examinees in 2026 are about 380,000 (estimated based on recent physics category proportion of about 73%), an increase of about 45.7% compared to 260,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line has been rising slightly year by year; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Northeast China, which is a cross-province application for Jiangsu examinees, with average regional preference; the physics category enrollment scale is small, only 19 after expansion in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of physics category enrollment by about 58.3% in 2026, and the increase of provincial physics category examinees by about 45.7%, the expansion effect is slightly greater than the examinee increase; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move backward compared to the 2025 baseline (ranking number increases); predicted minimum ranking about 50522, range 50022-51022.
